sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38073" key="e)pana/kamyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπανά-καμψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n38073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">return,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπὶ τὴν πρώτην ἡλικίαν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1545.tlg001:1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ocell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
